Bank of America Comments on Stress Test Results; Plans to Increase Quarterly Dividend 8% to $0.28 Per Share Bank of America today commented on the results of the Federal Reserve's 2025 Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR) and announced plans to increase its quarterly common stock dividend to $0.28 per share beginning in the third quarter of 2025.
